name: Lost passport while abroad — travel insurance coverage
description: User lost passport in a foreign country

input.message: I lost my passport in Barcelona. I have travel insurance with ICICI Lombard. Does my travel insurance cover passport loss? What should I do?

notes: Must provide actionable steps: 1) File police report (denuncia in Spain), 2) Contact Indian Embassy/Consulate for emergency certificate, 3) Travel insurance typically covers passport replacement costs, emergency hotel, rebooking. 4) Call insurer helpline. Must be empathetic.
